comment: Finalized BLP-6: committed and fast-forward merged to master; Android Mobile root cause remains unproved.

page.summary: BLP-6 finalization completed: the accepted file-embed mount-scroll regression was committed and merged to master, with Android Mobile root cause still explicitly out of scope.

outOfScope: Android Mobile root cause remains with the parent BLP-5 RCA.
Version bump, changelog, tags, and release publishing were not part of this finalization.
